criteria.description: Full edge-type creation support for ENTITY_COOCCUR, LLM_ASSERTED, SPLIT_SIBLING, REDIRECT
criteria.check: TestEdgeTypes/NewCSREdge - all 4 types constructible via NewCSREdge; TestEdgeTypes/NameParseRoundTrip - canonical string tokens round-trip

criteria.description: Undefined/invalid EdgeType values are rejected, not silently accepted, across every write/decode path
criteria.check: TestEdgeTypes/ValidEdgeType (unit); TestEdgeTypes/NewCSREdge (constructor); TestEdgeTypes/EdgeLogRejectsUndefinedType (EdgeLog.AppendEdge); TestEdgeTypes/WriteCSRRejectsUndefinedType (WriteCSR); TestEdgeTypes/CSREdgeEncodeDecodeRoundTrip (decodeCSREdge on corrupted type byte)

criteria.description: ENTITY_COOCCUR sums weight; SPLIT_SIBLING/REDIRECT/LLM_ASSERTED are last-write-wins dedup by (source,target,type)
criteria.check: Already covered by 3.1.3's existing compact_test.go (TestCompaction and subtests); confirmed correct by direct code reading in architecture-discovery.md, no change made to compact.go so no new test needed for this criterion

criteria.description: Existing 3.1.1-3.1.3 test suites remain green after tightening validation
gofmt/go vet/go build clean, -race on concurrency-relevant tests, explicit -timeout on every go test invocation
